0.text: Increased density and minimal structural distortions in the apical segments of both lungs, consistent with scarring

1.text: Thickening of the interlobar and interlobular septa and pleuroparenchymal band densities in the subpleural area of the left upper lobe apicoposterior segment and inferior lingular segment, consistent with scarring

3.text: Thickening of the interlobar and interlobular septa in the parenchyma adjacent to the effusion in the lower lobes of both lungs

4.text: Nodular consolidation area in the posterobasal and laterobasal segments of the left lung

6.text: Pleuroparenchymal linear densities in the laterobasal part of the right lower lobe, consistent with scarring
